section.heading: Assistants to commission; expenses of commission

content.p: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to assign any officials of the Interior Department to the assistance of the commission if he deems it advisable. He is authorized to pay the reasonable expenses of the commission and their assistants incurred in the actual performance of the duties imposed upon them by sections 426 to 426j of this title.

note.heading: Transfer of Functions
note.p: Transfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under section 426 of this title.
